query: Hvordan bliver vejret i Danmark de næste 7 dage?
criteria: Should call GET https://www.dmi.dk/dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/json/Danmark/DK/land7 and return a 7-day forecast including headline, synopsis, weatherForecast, uncertainty, and per-day sections. Should not use browser automation.

query: What's the weather forecast for Denmark today?
criteria: Should call the JSON API endpoint /dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/json/Danmark/DK/land and return weatherForecast text, plus mention date/valid period. Should prefer API over browser automation.

query: Get me the marine/sea forecast for Danish waters
criteria: Should call GET https://www.dmi.dk/dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/json/Farvandsudsigter/Danmark and return wind speed/direction, wave heights, ice conditions and/or fog warnings per sub-area.

query: find weather stations near aarhus from dmi
criteria: Should call GET https://www.dmi.dk/dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/waters/Aarhus (or similar search term) and return an array of stations with id, name, latitude, longitude, country, and capability flags (hassealevel, hasseatemp, haswave, hastide). Note: 204 No Content is acceptable behavior.

query: vis mig det nyeste radarbillede
criteria: Should reference the image endpoint https://www.dmi.dk/dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/image/gif/Radar/ (animation-ready GIF). Either fetches the binary or directs user to open the URL.

query: Hvordan er vejret i Grønland?
criteria: Should call GET https://www.dmi.dk/dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/json/Grønland/DK/land and surface regional sections such as Qaanaaq, Vestgrønland, Sydgrønland, Tasiilaq, or Ittoqqortoormiit.

query: I need a temperature map of Denmark
criteria: Should reference the image endpoint /dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/image/png/Temperatur, and may mention forecast suffixes like 24/48/72/120 for future periods.

query: current sea level / water level data for Denmark
criteria: Should call GET https://www.dmi.dk/dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/vandstand/active and return active water level stations with statistics like year20event, mlws, lowastrotide, year100event, year50event.

query: are there any weather warnings active right now?
criteria: Should direct user to https://www.dmi.dk/varsler (Denmark) or /varsler-gronland (Greenland) and note that warnings are React SPA-driven so browser automation is required (not available via JSON API).

query: Lufttrykskort for Danmark tak
criteria: Should reference the image endpoint /dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/image/png/Lufttryk for a pressure map.

query: Find me detailed shore station forecast for some specific harbor
criteria: Should explain the two-step flow: first GET /dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/waters/<searchTerm> to find the station's gid/id, then GET /dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/texts/<gid> to retrieve the detailed XML forecast.

query: where can I find the pollen forecast on dmi?
criteria: Should direct the user to https://www.dmi.dk/pollen and note this is not part of the JSON API (website navigation).

query: uv indeks i dag
criteria: Should direct user to https://www.dmi.dk/uv-indeks for UV index forecast.

query: I'm sailing near Bornholm tomorrow — what conditions should I expect?
criteria: Should use the marine forecast endpoint /dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/json/Farvandsudsigter/Danmark and possibly /waters/Bornholm to find a relevant station, then optionally /texts/<gid> for detailed text. Should mention wind, waves, and any fog/ice warnings.

query: tidevandstabeller
criteria: Should direct user to the tide tables page at https://www.dmi.dk/hav-og-is/temaforside-tidevand (note: not available via the JSON API).

query: Show me the polar satellite image
criteria: Should reference image endpoint /dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/image/png/polarsat for the polar satellite image.

query: What stations are within bounding box around Copenhagen (lat 55.5-55.8, lon 12.4-12.7)?
criteria: Should call GET /dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/location/area/<latMin>/<lonMin>/<latMax>/<lonMax>/<zoom> and describe response fields: mapWeatherSymbols, mapTempSymbols, mapLocationLatitudes, mapLocationLongitudes, mapLocationNames, mapCountry, ids.

query: Jeg vil gerne se klimaatlasset
criteria: Should direct user to https://www.dmi.dk/klimaatlas and note that browser automation is needed (interactive React tool, not available via JSON API).

query: wave height map for danish waters
criteria: Should reference image endpoint /dmidk_byvejrWS/rest/image/png/Bølgehøjde (or Bolgehojde) for a wave height map.

query: find historical weather data for last winter
criteria: Should direct user to https://www.dmi.dk/vejrarkiv and explicitly note that historical measurement data is NOT available via the JSON API — only the rendered website.
